'''Mos Gamos''' was a remote settlement on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was a known haven for criminals.

==History==
Mos Gamos served as the headquarters of the [[Clantaani]] gunslinger [[Longo Two-Guns]] and his [[Longo Two-Guns Gang|gang]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] [[Mission to Tatooine (The Hunt)|confronted]] the Two-Guns in this township in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], intending to claim the bounty [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] had placed on his gang's heads, and wiped out the Clantaani and his associates.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
